votes.reason: The archive index preserves Corpus V1 as searchable historical canon and links the settled closeout, readiness, and schema-hygiene seams without changing historical outcomes.
The seam improves handoff and audit posture while keeping Corpus V2 gated, leaving numbering unchanged, and avoiding any claim of live voting or runtime authority.
This is a docs-only archive layer that preserves Corpus V1 immutability and introduces no execution, provider, write, or persistence authority.
